Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9000 "METHODOS-9000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Methodos.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the LDA $DC01 instruction at $065C to be JSR $0680 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $0680 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the game will behave as if Q is pressed and proceed to the start game screen. If not pressed, the routine performs the LDA $DC01 and returns to continue the normal code flow.
